scene_attributes: mix of carpet (foreground) and wood flooring (kitchen)
payload.additional_notes: Interior doorway on left; decorative round wall mirror; stainless steel appliances in kitchen; curtains at right window.
payload.image_summary: Front-facing view from living area into open kitchen. Leather couch and recliner in foreground, table lamp and plant on side table, kitchen island and cabinets, stainless refrigerator, microwave and stove along the back wall, windows with blinds/curtains on right. Upstairs railing visible above.
